requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——缅甸 MS/IEC 62471（自愿性）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——緬甸 MS/IEC 62471（自願性）

summary.en: Myanmar does not have a mandatory photobiological safety certification requirement for LED luminaires as of 2026. MSTRD has aligned with the IEC 62471 series (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems) through the MS standards adoption process, but compliance is voluntary and not enforced as a market-entry condition. MS/IEC 62471 defines Risk Group classifications (RG0 Exempt, RG1 Low, RG2 Moderate, RG3 High) based on blue light hazard, UV hazard, thermal hazard, and infrared hazard limits. Commercial and government procurement specifications in Myanmar may reference IEC 62471 risk group declarations, particularly for luminaires used in public, healthcare, or educational settings.
summary.zh: 截至 2026 年，缅甸对 LED 灯具没有强制性光生物安全认证要求。MSTRD 通过 MS 标准采用流程已对应 IEC 62471 系列（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），但合规为自愿性，不作为市场准入的强制条件执行。MS/IEC 62471 基于蓝光危害、紫外危害、热危害及红外危害限值定义风险组分类（RG0 豁免、RG1 低风险、RG2 中等风险、RG3 高风险）。缅甸商业及政府采购规格可能引用 IEC 62471 风险组声明，尤其适用于公共场所、医疗及教育场所使用的灯具。
summary.zht: 截至 2026 年，緬甸對 LED 燈具沒有強制性光生物安全認證要求。MSTRD 通過 MS 標準採用流程已對應 IEC 62471 系列（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），但合規為自願性，不作為市場准入的強制條件執行。MS/IEC 62471 基於藍光危害、紫外危害、熱危害及紅外危害限值定義風險組分類（RG0 豁免、RG1 低風險、RG2 中等風險、RG3 高風險）。緬甸商業及政府採購規格可能引用 IEC 62471 風險組聲明，尤其適用於公共場所、醫療及教育場所使用的燈具。

standards_or_laws: MS/IEC 62471 (Myanmar standard aligned with IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems) — voluntary adoption by MSTRD

summary.en: In China, photobiological safety for LED lamps and luminaires is assessed under GB/T 20145-2006 (equivalent to IEC/TR 62471:2006) and GB 7000.1-2015 (General requirements for luminaires, which references photobiological safety provisions). For CCC-certified luminaires, photobiological safety risk group declarations (RG0 or RG1 for general consumer use) are typically included in the product technical file. Blue light hazard (BLH) class labelling on LED lamps for general lighting is addressed under GB/T 20145 and referenced in CCC test programmes.
summary.zh: 在中国，LED 灯具的光生物安全依据 GB/T 20145-2006（等同于 IEC/TR 62471:2006）和 GB 7000.1-2015（灯具通用要求，引用光生物安全条款）进行评估。对于取得 CCC 认证的灯具，光生物安全风险组声明（通用消费品通常为 RG0 或 RG1）通常包含在产品技术文件中。普通照明 LED 灯的蓝光危害（BLH）等级标注依据 GB/T 20145 并在 CCC 检测程序中引用。
summary.zht: 在中國，LED 燈具的光生物安全依據 GB/T 20145-2006（等同於 IEC/TR 62471:2006）和 GB 7000.1-2015（燈具通用要求，引用光生物安全條款）進行評估。對於取得 CCC 認證的燈具，光生物安全風險組聲明（通用消費品通常為 RG0 或 RG1）通常包含在產品技術文件中。普通照明 LED 燈的藍光危害（BLH）等級標注依據 GB/T 20145 並在 CCC 檢測程序中引用。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (equivalent to IEC/TR 62471:2006, SAC/SAMR)
GB 7000.1-2015 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (SAC/SAMR — includes photobiological safety provisions)

gap.en: Myanmar does not mandate photobiological safety risk group labelling or certification for LED luminaires as of 2026. Chinese CCC test reports including GB/T 20145 photobiological safety risk group declarations will satisfy any Myanmar project-specification or buyer due diligence requirement referencing IEC 62471. No additional Myanmar-specific photobiological safety testing is required. Manufacturers whose products are already classified as RG0 or RG1 under CN testing have a straightforward documentation position for Myanmar market entry.
gap.zh: 截至 2026 年，缅甸未强制要求 LED 灯具进行光生物安全风险组标注或认证。含 GB/T 20145 光生物安全风险组声明的中国 CCC 检测报告，可满足引用 IEC 62471 的缅甸项目规格或采购方尽职调查要求。无需为缅甸额外进行光生物安全测试。已依据中国检测归类为 RG0 或 RG1 的产品制造商，在进入缅甸市场时具备明确的文件依据。
gap.zht: 截至 2026 年，緬甸未強制要求 LED 燈具進行光生物安全風險組標注或認證。含 GB/T 20145 光生物安全風險組聲明的中國 CCC 檢測報告，可滿足引用 IEC 62471 的緬甸項目規格或採購方盡職調查要求。無需為緬甸額外進行光生物安全測試。已依據中國檢測歸類為 RG0 或 RG1 的產品製造商，在進入緬甸市場時具備明確的文件依據。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary — no mandatory photobiological safety certification or risk group labelling required for LED luminaires in Myanmar as of 2026; MS/IEC 62471 may be referenced in commercial and government procurement specifications
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (within CCC) — GB/T 20145 photobiological safety assessment is part of the CCC luminaire certification programme; risk group declaration required in the technical file

source.publisher: Myanmar Standards and Testing Research Division (MSTRD), Ministry of Science and Technology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Myanmar has no mandatory photobiological safety certification requirement for LED luminaires as of 2026. IEC 62471 compliance is voluntary. Chinese CCC test reports including GB/T 20145 risk group declarations satisfy any Myanmar buyer or project specification requirement. No Myanmar-specific retesting is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至 2026 年，缅甸对 LED 灯具无强制性光生物安全认证要求。IEC 62471 合规为自愿性。含 GB/T 20145 风险组声明的中国 CCC 检测报告可满足缅甸采购方或项目规格要求。无需为缅甸专门进行重新测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至 2026 年，緬甸對 LED 燈具無強制性光生物安全認證要求。IEC 62471 合規為自願性。含 GB/T 20145 風險組聲明的中國 CCC 檢測報告可滿足緬甸採購方或項目規格要求。無需為緬甸專門進行重新測試。

requirement_topic.en: Blue Light Hazard (BLH) Labelling Requirement — Myanmar Status
requirement_topic.zh: 蓝光危害（BLH）标注要求——缅甸现状
requirement_topic.zht: 藍光危害（BLH）標注要求——緬甸現狀

summary.en: Myanmar has no mandatory blue light hazard (BLH) labelling requirement for LED lamps or luminaires as of 2026. There is no Myanmar regulation equivalent to the EU energy label's mandatory BLH class marking. MSTRD has not issued a mandatory MS standard or notification requiring BLH risk group labelling on LED product packaging or luminaires for the domestic or import market. Inclusion of a BLH risk group declaration (e.g., 'Risk Group 0 — No photobiological hazard' or 'RG1') on product documentation or packaging is a best practice and may be requested by commercial buyers, but is not a statutory requirement.
summary.zh: 截至 2026 年，缅甸对 LED 灯具无强制性蓝光危害（BLH）标注要求。缅甸没有与欧盟能效标签强制 BLH 等级标注相当的法规。MSTRD 未发布要求在 LED 产品包装或灯具上标注 BLH 风险组的强制性 MS 标准或通知，适用范围包括国内及进口市场。在产品文件或包装上注明 BLH 风险组声明（如「风险组 0 — 无光生物危害」或「RG1」）是最佳实践，商业采购方可能会要求提供，但不属于法定要求。
summary.zht: 截至 2026 年，緬甸對 LED 燈具無強制性藍光危害（BLH）標注要求。緬甸沒有與歐盟能效標籤強制 BLH 等級標注相當的法規。MSTRD 未發布要求在 LED 產品包裝或燈具上標注 BLH 風險組的強制性 MS 標準或通知，適用範圍包括國內及進口市場。在產品文件或包裝上注明 BLH 風險組聲明（如「風險組 0 — 無光生物危害」或「RG1」）是最佳實踐，商業採購方可能會要求提供，但不屬於法定要求。

standards_or_laws: No mandatory Myanmar BLH labelling standard as of 2026
MS/IEC 62471 (voluntary reference for BLH risk group classification)

summary.en: In China, blue light hazard (BLH) labelling for LED lamps is addressed under GB/T 20145-2006 and the supplementary CCC certification requirements for luminaires. Products classified as RG2 (Moderate Risk) are required to carry a warning label advising against prolonged direct viewing. General consumer LED lamps typically must be RG0 or RG1; RG2 products face additional labelling and use-restriction documentation requirements in the CN CCC framework.
summary.zh: 在中国，LED 灯具的蓝光危害（BLH）标注依据 GB/T 20145-2006 及灯具 CCC 认证的补充要求执行。归类为 RG2（中等风险）的产品须附有警告标识，告知不宜长时间直视。通用消费型 LED 灯通常须为 RG0 或 RG1；RG2 产品在中国 CCC 框架下面临额外的标注及使用限制文件要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，LED 燈具的藍光危害（BLH）標注依據 GB/T 20145-2006 及燈具 CCC 認證的補充要求執行。歸類為 RG2（中等風險）的產品須附有警告標識，告知不宜長時間直視。通用消費型 LED 燈通常須為 RG0 或 RG1；RG2 產品在中國 CCC 框架下面臨額外的標注及使用限制文件要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems — BLH risk group classification and warning label requirements (SAC/SAMR)

gap.en: Myanmar imposes no BLH labelling obligation — Chinese GB/T 20145 BLH risk group documentation exceeds Myanmar's current requirements. Manufacturers should include BLH risk group information in product technical data sheets as a best practice for commercial buyers; no Myanmar-specific BLH label format is mandated. This is a gap running in reverse: CN products carry more BLH documentation than Myanmar requires.
gap.zh: 缅甸无 BLH 标注义务——中国 GB/T 20145 BLH 风险组文件超过缅甸现行要求。制造商应在产品技术数据表中纳入 BLH 风险组信息，作为面向商业采购方的最佳实践；缅甸未规定特定 BLH 标签格式。这是一个反向差距：中国产品所携带的 BLH 文件多于缅甸的要求。
gap.zht: 緬甸無 BLH 標注義務——中國 GB/T 20145 BLH 風險組文件超過緬甸現行要求。製造商應在產品技術數據表中納入 BLH 風險組信息，作為面向商業採購方的最佳實踐；緬甸未規定特定 BLH 標籤格式。這是一個反向差距：中國產品所攜帶的 BLH 文件多於緬甸的要求。

mandatory_status.target: Not required — no mandatory BLH labelling for LED luminaires in Myanmar as of 2026
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (within CCC) — BLH risk group declaration required; RG2 products require warning labels under GB/T 20145 within the CCC certification framework

source.publisher: Myanmar Standards and Testing Research Division (MSTRD), Ministry of Science and Technology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Myanmar has no mandatory blue light hazard labelling requirement for LED luminaires as of 2026. Chinese CCC BLH risk group documentation satisfies any Myanmar buyer requirement. Including BLH risk group data on product datasheets is recommended as best practice but is not legally required for Myanmar market access.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至 2026 年，缅甸对 LED 灯具无强制性蓝光危害标注要求。中国 CCC BLH 风险组文件可满足缅甸采购方的任何要求。建议将 BLH 风险组数据纳入产品数据表作为最佳实践，但进入缅甸市场不存在法定要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至 2026 年，緬甸對 LED 燈具無強制性藍光危害標注要求。中國 CCC BLH 風險組文件可滿足緬甸採購方的任何要求。建議將 BLH 風險組數據納入產品數據表作為最佳實踐，但進入緬甸市場不存在法定要求。
